series_metadata.series_description: IRP Audit Files. IRP is a plan by which a motor carrier can register a fleet of interjurisdictional vehicles in a single jurisdiction and the registration fees are proportionately distributed to each appropriate jurisdiction. Audit work papers, correspondences, schedules, audit report, audit summary sheets, computation sheets, opening conference reports and audit findings letters.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: Peer Review has been completed or no longer of Administrative Value. ; Paper: Peer Review has been completed or no longer Administrative Value. If scanned
